meta.title: CyberRealistic XL - High-Fidelity Photorealistic AI Generation
meta.description: Experience natural photorealism and robust scenic coherence. CyberRealistic XL is a leading open-source SDXL base model optimized for lifelike human textures, complex compositions, and straightforward prompting.

hero.title: Generate High-Fidelity Photorealistic Images with Ease
hero.description: Avoid artificial textures and complex negative prompting. CyberRealistic XL delivers highly realistic human features, skin textures, and balanced lighting directly from simple, descriptive natural language prompts.

image.alt: CyberRealistic XL high-fidelity photorealistic image generation workflow

branding.title: The solid foundation for photorealistic AI generation
branding.description: Developed by Cyberdelia, CyberRealistic XL addresses the common pitfalls of generic SDXL base models, serving as a reliable and flexible canvas for creators, fine-tuners, and developers.

introduce.title: Highly realistic output with minimal prompting complexity
introduce.description: Many photorealistic checkpoints require extensive negative embeddings and overly specific, complex parameters just to avoid basic rendering errors. CyberRealistic XL uses continuous custom blends and rigorous testing to yield clean, balanced results naturally.

image.alt: Comparison between standard SDXL rendering and CyberRealistic XL's lifelike textures

items.title: High-Fidelity Skin & Eye Rendering
items.description: Captures fine skin pores, hair detail, and sharp light reflections in eyes for genuine photographic quality.

items.title: Robust Composition Coherence
items.description: Excels at rendering multi-subject scenes, action shots, and unconventional camera angles with a lower rate of structural failure.

items.title: Simplicity in Usage
items.description: Engineered to deliver solid, studio-grade results using short, descriptive natural language prompts without mandatory clutter.

benefit.title: Why CyberRealistic XL is a popular choice for photorealistic AI
benefit.description: Photographers, digital designers, and AI creators need precise control over lighting, composition, and human anatomy. CyberRealistic XL bridges the gap between digital generation and authentic photographic aesthetics.

image.alt: Digital creator utilizing CyberRealistic XL in a professional node-based workflow

usage.title: How to create with CyberRealistic XL
usage.description: Generate high-quality photography by following these simple setup and sampling recommendations.

items.title: 1. Load the Checkpoint
items.description: Download the latest CyberRealistic XL safetensors and place it in your stable-diffusion-webui or ComfyUI models directory.

items.title: 2. Keep Your Prompt Simple
items.description: Write your prompt in descriptive natural language (e.g., 'A candid portrait of a woman at a coffee shop, natural light, shallow depth of field').

items.title: 3. Configure Sampler Settings
items.description: Set your sampler to DPM++ 2M SDE Karras, steps to 30+, and CFG scale between 3 and 5 for optimal results.

items.title: 4. Upscale with Hires.fix
items.description: Perform a 1.5x upscale with a low denoising strength (0.3 - 0.35) using 4x_NickelbackFS_72000_G for optimal sharpness.

feature.title: Advanced capabilities for professional workflows
feature.description: Packed with continuous refinement and custom optimizations, CyberRealistic XL sets a reliable benchmark for open-source photorealistic models.

items.title: Baked-In VAE & Color Tuning
items.description: No more washed-out colors. The integrated VAE is optimized for rich contrast, natural skin tones, and neutral light temperatures.
bullets: Reduced desaturation issues
Natural skin tones and neutral lighting
Predictable rendering without extra files

items.description: Unlike generic photorealism models that struggle with dynamic action, this model maintains high coherence during motion.

items.title: Optimized CFG Sensitivity
items.description: Engineered to deliver exceptional fidelity even at lower CFG scales, keeping generations clean and avoiding artifacting.
bullets: Maintains high quality at lower CFG scales (3-5)
Reduces visual noise and digital artifacting
High fidelity to prompt descriptors

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about CyberRealistic XL, its parameters, and how to use it.

items.question: What is CyberRealistic XL?
items.answer: CyberRealistic XL is an open-source, SDXL-based photorealistic image generation model developed by Cyberdelia.

items.question: How is it different from CyberRealistic Pony?
items.answer: CyberRealistic XL is built on standard SDXL 1.0, focusing on realistic environments, scenery, and natural human textures using simple natural language. CyberRealistic Pony is based on Pony Diffusion V6, which is optimized for complex poses, stylized characters, and NSFW content, but requires specific 'score_9' tags and custom negative embeddings.

items.question: How should I format my prompts?
items.answer: Unlike other models, CyberRealistic XL does not require overly long or repetitive prompt templates. Simply write a natural English description of your scene, and add basic photography terms if needed (e.g., 'RAW photo, golden hour, shallow depth of field').

items.question: What are the recommended generation settings?
items.answer: For optimal results, use the DPM++ 2M SDE Karras sampler, 30+ steps, a CFG scale between 3 and 5, and an initial resolution of 832x1216 or 896x1152. A 1.5x upscale with a low denoising strength (0.3 - 0.35) is highly recommended.

items.question: Do I need to load an external VAE?
items.answer: No, CyberRealistic XL has a baked-in VAE, so you do not need to download or apply an external VAE file in your WebUI or ComfyUI.

items.question: Can I use this model commercially?
items.answer: Yes, the model allows commercial use of generated images under the CreativeML Open RAIL++-M license. Please refer to the official model page on Civitai or Hugging Face for the complete and updated terms.

items.question: What is the difference between the main version and the Catalyst version?
items.answer: CyberRealistic XL is the stable, production-ready release. CyberRealistic XL Catalyst is an experimental branch where the author tests new merge ratios and training techniques. Successful elements from the Catalyst version are periodically integrated into the main model updates.

cta.title: Experience realistic AI photography today
cta.description: Stop struggling with complex negative prompts. Build highly realistic, cohesive scenes with CyberRealistic XL.
